purpose: Resolve story-plan candidate ambiguity before any Gemini candidate can become governed Story-to-TDD authority.

decisions.decision: For the story-slug cognitive path, promoted authority remains limited to the accepted criteria examples and canonical rule that unsupported punctuation is removed. Gemini's stricter claim that only lowercase ASCII letters and hyphens are permitted, excluding digits and all non-ASCII letters, is not promoted in this slice.
The exact blocked result shape is { "status": "blocked", "blocker": "empty_slug_input" }.
decisions.authorityEffect: object shape accepted; Gemini string literal rejected

decisions.decision: Gemini may propose extra test cases, but extra criteria or expanded behavioral scope cannot become authority unless explicitly promoted through acceptance criteria hardening.

forbids: promoting extra test cases as criteria without acceptance hardening
overwriting fixture/replay proof authority without an authority promotion receipt
completionPosture: Ambiguity decisions may promote only the already-governed authority surface; Gemini expansions remain quarantined until separately accepted.
